17 Agents · 30 Focused AI Calls · Live Market Data

Your AI Co-Founder
for Any Business

Discover, validate, and launch real-world businesses with a full AI research team. Demographics, financials, compliance, real estate, and a full SBA business plan — in minutes.

🧠
AI Answers
Describe your idea in plain English. AI orchestrates all 17 research agents and keeps you updated live.
📊
Viability Score
Get a 0–100 business score with Go / Cautious / No-Go verdict backed by real market data.
💰
Financial Modeling
3-scenario P&L, break-even analysis, and city-by-city cost comparisons with live real estate data.
📋
SBA Business Plan
Full SBA 7(a) loan package, investor deck, and executive summary — ready to print or export.
🗺️
Interactive Market Map
Leaflet-powered map showing competitor locations, gap scores, and real estate listings by city.
📁
Portfolio Workspace
Compare multiple business ideas side by side. Save runs, track scores, and build your portfolio.
